title: TC001-Complete checkout from the cart
description: A patient can proceed from cart to checkout and complete an order successfully.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        # Wider default timeout to match the agent's DOM-stability budget;
        # auto-waiting Playwright APIs (expect, locator.wait_for) inherit this.
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:8080")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Navigate to the login page and verify the login screen is displayed (look for the Moroccan phone number input or 'تسجيل الدخول' / phone label).
        await page.goto("http://localhost:8080/login")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Click the 'Reload' button on the browser error page to retry loading the login page and verify the Moroccan phone input or Arabic 'تسجيل الدخول' label appears.
        # Reload button
        elem = page.locator('[id="reload-button"]')
        await elem.click(timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Reload' button on the browser error page to retry loading the login screen and verify the Moroccan phone number input or the Arabic 'تسجيل الدخول' login label appears.
        # Reload button
        elem = page.locator('[id="reload-button"]')
        await elem.click(timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        # Assert: Verify a successful order confirmation is visible
        assert False, "Expected: Verify a successful order confirmation is visible (could not be verified on the page)"
        
        # --> Test blocked by environment/access constraints during agent run
        # Reason: TEST BLOCKED The patient-facing app could not be reached on localhost:8080; the web server returned an empty response and the login UI never loaded. Observations: - The browser shows 'This page isn’t working' and 'ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE'. - Only a 'Reload' button was available and clicking it did not restore the app. - No login fields, Moroccan phone input, or shop UI were reachable, preventing the...
        raise AssertionError("Test blocked during agent run: " + "TEST BLOCKED The patient-facing app could not be reached on localhost:8080; the web server returned an empty response and the login UI never loaded. Observations: - The browser shows 'This page isn\u2019t working' and 'ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE'. - Only a 'Reload' button was available and clicking it did not restore the app. - No login fields, Moroccan phone input, or shop UI were reachable, preventing the..." + " — the exported script cannot reproduce a PASS in this environment.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST BLOCKED

The patient-facing app could not be reached on localhost:8080; the web server returned an empty response and the login UI never loaded.

Observations:
- The browser shows 'This page isn’t working' and 'ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE'.
- Only a 'Reload' button was available and clicking it did not restore the app.
- No login fields, Moroccan phone input, or shop UI were reachable, preventing the checkout flow from being tested.

title: TC002-Add a product to the cart from product details

code:

Observations: - The browser shows an error page: "ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE" and the message '127.0.0.1 didn\'t send any data.' - The only interactive control on the page is a Reload button; clicking Reload did not recover the app or render the login screen. - No application UI ele...

testError:
TEST BLOCKED

The test could not be run because the patient web app did not respond and the login UI could not be reached.

Observations:
- The browser shows an error page: "ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE" and the message '127.0.0.1 didn\'t send any data.'
- The only interactive control on the page is a Reload button; clicking Reload did not recover the app or render the login screen.
- No application UI elements (phone input, OTP field, or shop links) were present, so the login and add-to-cart flows could not be executed.

title: TC004-Complete patient phone sign-in and reach the patient experience

title: TC008-Add a product to the cart from the shop

title: TC009-Protect authenticated patient screens from unauthenticated access
description: A user who is not signed in is redirected away from protected patient screens and cannot view authenticated content.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        # Wider default timeout to match the agent's DOM-stability budget;
        # auto-waiting Playwright APIs (expect, locator.wait_for) inherit this.
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:8080")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Click the 'Reload' button on the browser error page to retry loading the /chat route and verify whether the Arabic login screen appears.
        # Reload button
        elem = page.locator('[id="reload-button"]')
        await elem.click(timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Final action — this is where the agent failed
        # Error observed by agent: Navigation failed - site unavailable: http://localhost:8080/shop
        await page.goto("http://localhost:8080/shop")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        
        # --> Verify the login screen is displayed
        # Assert: Expected URL to contain '/login' indicating the login screen is displayed.
        await expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile("/login"), timeout=15000), "Expected URL to contain '/login' indicating the login screen is displayed."
        
        # --> Verify the login screen is displayed
        # Assert: Expected URL to contain '/login' to show the login screen.
        await expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile("/login"), timeout=15000), "Expected URL to contain '/login' to show the login screen."
        
        # --> Test blocked by environment/access constraints during agent run
        # Reason: TEST BLOCKED The test could not be run — the patient application on localhost:8080 is not reachable, preventing verification of redirect/login behavior for unauthenticated users. Observations: - Navigating to /chat produced ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE (localhost didn’t send any data). - Navigating to /shop produced ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE and the browser error page 'This page isn’t working' was shown.
        raise AssertionError("Test blocked during agent run: " + "TEST BLOCKED The test could not be run \u2014 the patient application on localhost:8080 is not reachable, preventing verification of redirect/login behavior for unauthenticated users. Observations: - Navigating to /chat produced ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE (localhost didn\u2019t send any data). - Navigating to /shop produced ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE and the browser error page 'This page isn\u2019t working' was shown." + " — the exported script cannot reproduce a PASS in this environment.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
